description_long: This is a green, blocky airplane with a straight, high-mounted wing configuration and a boxy fuselage, reminiscent of a toy or model aircraft. The wings and tail surfaces are decorated with yellow and white stripes, as well as blue circular emblems featuring a yellow and green design. The airplane has a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, both matching the wing's color scheme. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a transparent canopy section. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main gear units under the wings and a smaller nose gear, all visible and integrated into the blocky structure.
description: A green, blocky airplane with high-mounted straight wings, colorful stripes, and blue emblems, featuring a conventional tail and fixed landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, high-mounted wings, dual main landing gear, and the cockpit at the nose.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blocky fuselage, cockpit canopy, and the fixed landing gear beneath the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal and vertical stabilizers, as well as the symmetrical wing and tail design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the tail and wing emblems.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible dihedral or winglets, featuring blocky, rectangular planform.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the wings or fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a transparent canopy, likely single-seat.
